title: Project Scope Statement
description: Formal document defining project boundaries, deliverables, and exclusions agreed by all stakeholders.

title: Performance Benchmarks
description: Minimum Lighthouse scores, Core Web Vitals targets, page load time thresholds, and uptime SLA.

title: Browser Compatibility Matrix
description: Required browser and OS combinations to be tested and officially supported at launch.

title: Responsive Design Spec
description: Breakpoint definitions, fluid grid rules, and component behavior across mobile, tablet, and desktop.

title: UI Component Specifications
description: Detailed spec of every UI component including states, props, breakpoints, and interaction behavior.

title: State Management Plan
description: Chosen state management approach, store structure, data flow diagrams, and persistence rules.

title: Frontend Tech Stack Agreement
description: Agreed framework, build tool, linting rules, and package manager for the project.

title: Component Testing Standards
description: Unit and integration test coverage targets, testing library choice, mocking strategy, and CI gate.

title: SEO and Keywords Strategy
description: Target keywords, meta tag guidelines, URL structure, and on-page SEO optimization requirements.

title: Third-Party Integrations List
description: All external APIs, analytics tools, tag managers, and SDKs the frontend must connect to.

title: Database ERD
description: Entity Relationship Diagram showing all tables, column types, and foreign key relationships.

title: API Documentation
description: Complete REST endpoint specs including auth methods, request/response schemas, and error codes.

title: Authentication and Security
description: OAuth2 or JWT strategy, role definitions, password policy, and data encryption standards.

title: Data Retention Policy
description: Rules governing storage duration, archiving strategy, backup frequency, and secure deletion.

title: GDPR Compliance Checklist
description: Data subject rights, consent logging, right to erasure flow, and DPA contact details.

title: Error Handling Standards
description: Standardized error codes, response envelope structure, logging format, and escalation rules.

title: Database Migration Plan
description: Migration tooling, rollback strategy, zero-downtime deployment approach, and seed data scripts.

title: Rate Limiting Policy
description: API rate limit thresholds per endpoint, throttling strategy, and response headers.

title: API Response Envelope Standard
description: Consistent JSON wrapper structure for all responses including data, error, meta, and pagination.

title: Health Check Endpoint Spec
description: Required health check routes, response schema, dependency check inclusions, and monitoring integration.

title: Onboarding Flow Documentation

title: User Journey Maps
